title: The Black Duke
writer: Mario Amendola, Tullio Bruschi, Max Di Thiene
actors: Cameron Mitchell, Conrado San Martín, Maria Grazia Spina
plot: Cesare Borgia--a cardinal in the Catholic church, a confidant of the Pope and a member of one of the wealthiest and most powerful families in 16th-century Italy--must deal with a host of political and personal crises. He is having...
